=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (10:54-10:70) TS377046: The `Self` type parameter for this class should be `InvalidSchemaClass`. effect(classSelfMismatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable classSelfMismatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable classSelfMismatch for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace 'ValidSchemaClass' with 'InvalidSchemaClass'"

[D2] (15:54-15:78) TS377045: Identifier 'ValidSchemaTaggedClass' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
  Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'ValidSchemaTaggedClass'"

  Fix 0: "Disable classSelfMismatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable classSelfMismatch for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace 'ValidSchemaTaggedClass' with 'InvalidSchemaTaggedClass'"

  Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'InvalidSchemaTaggedClass'"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable classSelfMismatch for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable classSelfMismatch for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace 'ValidSchemaClass' with 'InvalidSchemaClass'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_schema.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// valid usage
export class ValidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("ValidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// invalid usage: Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass> should be Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass>("InvalidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("ValidSchemaTaggedClass")("ValidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass> should be Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass")("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("ValidSchemaTaggedError")("ValidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError> should be Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("InvalidSchemaTaggedError")("InvalidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest")("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest> should be Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest")("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'ValidSchemaTaggedClass'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_schema.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// valid usage
export class ValidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("ValidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// invalid usage: Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass> should be Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("InvalidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>()("ValidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass> should be Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass")("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("ValidSchemaTaggedError")("ValidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError> should be Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("InvalidSchemaTaggedError")("InvalidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest")("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest> should be Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest")("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable classSelfMismatch for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable classSelfMismatch for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Replace 'ValidSchemaTaggedClass' with 'InvalidSchemaTaggedClass'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_schema.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// valid usage
export class ValidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("ValidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// invalid usage: Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass> should be Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("InvalidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("ValidSchemaTaggedClass")("ValidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass> should be Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass>("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass")("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("ValidSchemaTaggedError")("ValidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError> should be Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("InvalidSchemaTaggedError")("InvalidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest")("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest> should be Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest")("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file" ===

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'InvalidSchemaTaggedClass'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_schema.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// valid usage
export class ValidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("ValidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// invalid usage: Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass> should be Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("InvalidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("ValidSchemaTaggedClass")("ValidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass> should be Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>()("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("ValidSchemaTaggedError")("ValidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError> should be Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("InvalidSchemaTaggedError")("InvalidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest")("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest> should be Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest")("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line" ===

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file" ===

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'ValidSchemaTaggedError'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_schema.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// valid usage
export class ValidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("ValidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// invalid usage: Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass> should be Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("InvalidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("ValidSchemaTaggedClass")("ValidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass> should be Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass")("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>()("ValidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError> should be Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("InvalidSchemaTaggedError")("InvalidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest")("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest> should be Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest")("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable classSelfMismatch for this line" ===

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable classSelfMismatch for entire file" ===

=== [D6] Fix 2: "Replace 'ValidSchemaTaggedError' with 'InvalidSchemaTaggedError'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_schema.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// valid usage
export class ValidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("ValidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// invalid usage: Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass> should be Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("InvalidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("ValidSchemaTaggedClass")("ValidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass> should be Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass")("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("ValidSchemaTaggedError")("ValidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError> should be Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError>("InvalidSchemaTaggedError")("InvalidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest")("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest> should be Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest")("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D7] Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line" ===

=== [D7] Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file" ===

=== [D7] Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'InvalidSchemaTaggedError'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_schema.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// valid usage
export class ValidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("ValidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// invalid usage: Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass> should be Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("InvalidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("ValidSchemaTaggedClass")("ValidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass> should be Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass")("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("ValidSchemaTaggedError")("ValidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError> should be Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>()("InvalidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest")("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest> should be Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest")("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D8] Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file" ===

=== [D8] Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'ValidSchemaTaggedRequest'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_schema.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// valid usage
export class ValidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("ValidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// invalid usage: Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass> should be Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("InvalidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("ValidSchemaTaggedClass")("ValidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass> should be Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass")("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("ValidSchemaTaggedError")("ValidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError> should be Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("InvalidSchemaTaggedError")("InvalidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>()("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest> should be Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest")("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D9] Fix 0: "Disable classSelfMismatch for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D9] Fix 1: "Disable classSelfMismatch for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D9] Fix 2: "Replace 'ValidSchemaTaggedRequest' with 'InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_schema.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// valid usage
export class ValidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("ValidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// invalid usage: Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass> should be Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("InvalidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("ValidSchemaTaggedClass")("ValidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass> should be Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass")("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("ValidSchemaTaggedError")("ValidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError> should be Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("InvalidSchemaTaggedError")("InvalidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest")("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest> should be Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest>("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest")("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D10] Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D10] Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D10] Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_schema.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// valid usage
export class ValidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("ValidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// invalid usage: Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass> should be Schema.Class<InvalidSchemaClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaClass extends Schema.Class<ValidSchemaClass>("InvalidSchemaClass")({
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("ValidSchemaTaggedClass")("ValidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass> should be Schema.TaggedClass<InvalidSchemaTaggedClass> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<ValidSchemaTaggedClass>("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass")("InvalidSchemaTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("ValidSchemaTaggedError")("ValidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError> should be Schema.TaggedError<InvalidSchemaTaggedError> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<ValidSchemaTaggedError>("InvalidSchemaTaggedError")("InvalidSchemaTaggedError", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

export class ValidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest")("ValidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}

// invalid usage: Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest> should be Schema.TaggedRequest<InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest> because the Self type parameter is not the same as the class name
export class InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<ValidSchemaTaggedRequest>()("InvalidSchemaTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}
